source: Orchestrator feature comparison (OctoAlly, LLM Orchestra, LaneConductor, FORGE, Sandcastle, Concilium, LLMTrio)

session_table.name: Session table with status, tokens, cost
session_table.opencodeR_status: Session info has tokens+cost fields. Missing status field and aggregation endpoint.

realtime_events.name: Real-time event stream
realtime_events.opencodeR_status: SSE streaming via /api/session/:id/event with broadcast channel.

session_lifecycle.name: Pause / Freeze / Continue / Kill
session_lifecycle.opencodeR_status: Not implemented. Needs status field + lifecycle endpoints.

cost_breakdown.name: Cost breakdown by model/provider
cost_breakdown.opencodeR_status: Only per-session total cost. No breakdown or aggregation.

trace_viewer.name: Session detail / trace viewer
trace_viewer.opencodeR_status: Messages and events available. No structured trace view.

terminal_console.name: Built-in per-session terminal console
terminal_console.opencodeR_status: PTY API works with real processes. WebSocket not fully wired.

audit_log.name: Audit log + JSONL export
audit_log.opencodeR_status: JSON export exists. JSONL format and audit log endpoint missing.

resource_limits.name: Resource limits per instance
resource_limits.opencodeR_status: Requires container runtime. Out of scope.

session_search.name: Session search / filter
session_search.opencodeR_status: Query params exist on API but InMemoryService doesn't implement filtering.

cost_optimization.name: Cost optimization / model routing
cost_optimization.opencodeR_status: Out of scope — sessions use configured model.

specialist_agents.name: Specialist agent library
specialist_agents.opencodeR_status: opencodeR is the agent runtime, not a library.
